info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and operating the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, facilitating product listings, order processing, and user account management.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, update, retrieval, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints to manage customer orders, track status, and process payments.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current contents of the shopping cart belonging to the user identified by the userId. Returns the detailed cart response including items, quantities, and totals.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must contain details about the item to add. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Represents the item to be added to the cart with quantity and product details.

example.message: The item data or userId provided is invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId based on their current cart or provided details. Returns the details of the placed order.

example.message: The order request parameters or userId are invalid.

details.issue: User ID does not exist or is malformed

404.description: User's cart not found or empty

example.message: The cart for the specified user was not found or empty.

details.issue: Cart does not exist for this user

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information for the order identified by orderId, including status, items, and history.

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid or malformed.
No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process using the data provided in the request body. Returns a payment response containing status and transaction details.

requestBody.description: Payment request details including amount, method, and payer information.

example.message: The payment request data is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handle incoming webhook notifications from payment gateways. This endpoint processes payment events such as successful payments, failures, refunds, or chargebacks. The request body must include the payment event data as defined in the payment_webhook schema. On success, returns a payment response confirming receipt and processing status.

requestBody.description: Payment event payload sent by the payment gateway

example.message: The webhook payload structure is invalid or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment required or invalid payment state

example.message: The payment information is incomplete or requires additional action.

details.issue: Payment method not supported or declined

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and register a new product in the product catalog. The request body must contain product details as defined by product_request schema, including name, description, price, and stock information. A successful response returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Product information to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Keyboard
example.description: Ergonomic wireless keyboard with backlit keys

example.name: Wireless Keyboard
example.description: Ergonomic wireless keyboard with backlit keys

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given SKU already exists in the catalog.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve current tracking status for an order
get.description: Fetch the latest shipping tracking information for a specified order using its unique orderId path parameter. The response includes current location, estimated delivery, carrier details, and shipment status. Useful to keep customers informed about their orders.

404.description: Order or tracking information not found

example.message: No shipping information found for the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or has no shipment

500.description: Internal server error retrieving tracking info

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing user information such as username, email, and password in the request body. On success, returns the newly created user details. Handles errors for existing users or invalid data.

requestBody.description: User registration data including credentials and profile information

example.message: Submitted user data failed validation checks.
A user with the given email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code in which the price is specified, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: The discount amount applied to the product.

price.description: Original price of the product before any discounts.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for all the prices in the cart.

items.description: List of items contained in the cart.

totalAmount.description: Sum of all item prices before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied across all items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last cart update in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to the ordered product.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the order item.

price.description: Price of the product before discount.

productId.description: Unique ID of the ordered product.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for prices in the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current status of the payment for the order.

status.description: Current processing status of the order.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Sum of all discounts applied in the order.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code representing the transaction currency

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway handling the transaction

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction, e.g., credit card, PayPal

amount.description: Final amount processed for the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier generated for this payment record

paymentMethod.description: Used payment method for this transaction

status.description: Current status of the payment, e.g., completed, pending, failed

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway after processing

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment related to this webhook event

status.description: Updated status of the payment according to the webhook event

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier associated with this webhook event

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category or type of the product

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product, scale 1-5

stock.description: Number of product units currently in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand name of the product

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product's price

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Quantity of product units currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last tracking update

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order related to this tracking

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates whether the user is currently active

country.description: User's country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

userType.description: Type or role of the user

active.description: Indicates whether the user is currently active

country.description: User's country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the user account was last updated

userType.description: Type or role of the user

error.description: Short error code or phrase indicating the type of client error

message.description: Detailed message describing the cause of the error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the client error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

path.description: Request path that caused the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request for tracing purposes

field.description: The name of the field with an issue

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field
issue.example: Must be a valid email address

error.description: Short error code or phrase indicating the type of server error

message.description: Detailed message describing the server error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the server error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request for tracing purposes
